title: Talk about the circle last night and how she felt
html:
TL;DR

  • A four-line July 2019 micro-todo: talk about the circle last night and how she felt / ask about last night with yabeen a little bit / talk more about climate change / fill big water jug / talk to margarita — five conversational and household action-items in six lines.
  • Earliest extant Yahir mention of climate change as a recurring discussion topic — the topic surfaces here as a thing to talk more about with a friend, not as a thesis or an essay prompt.
  • The format is doing its native job — interpersonal repair, errands, and a meta-topic interleaved without hierarchy, mid-July 2019, the Grants Pass teen era buzz.
  • "Talk about the circle last night and how she felt" — the title-as-task pattern that defines this period: Yahir maintains the relational maintenance queue inside Apple Notes alongside the chores.
  • Two new social-graph names surface — yabeen and margarita — both single-mention, queued to Potential Entities rather than stubbed.

Notes

The micro-doc is an exemplar of Yahir's note as letter to self mode in its lowest-resolution form: errand + interpersonal-repair + topical-curiosity, all flat, no priority weighting. "The circle" is unspecified — likely a friend group debrief or a specific event ("the circle last night"); without surrounding context the referent is opaque.

What's notable is the co-presence of climate change with fill big water jug — the macro and the micro live in the same list. This is the same brain that, eight months later, drops the 9/11 as exogenous event thesis nine days into COVID. The teenage habit is to put climate next to the water jug; the adult version is to put COVID next to the supplement stack. The list-as-mind-state continues.

"Talk to margarita" (lowercase, person? plural noun? drink?) is genuinely ambiguous — a friend Margarita seems most likely given the parallel construction with yabeen (also probably a person/nickname).

Privacy note

Two informal names (yabeen, margarita) — neither tied to a surname or identifying detail. No redactions; queued to Potential Entities.

Connections

  • 2019 07 19 tile for alexandria · 2019 07 20 situations with girls after alexandria — same-week sibling notes
  • grants pass teen era
  • 2018 12 24 normal neutral to everything — earlier matrix-thinking sibling
